# PulsePoint Clinic

> Physician-led cardiovascular care in Columbia, Missouri.

PulsePoint Clinic provides preventive cardiology, advanced heart diagnostics, and personalized cardiovascular care for patients in Columbia, Boone County, and Central Missouri.

## Location

- Address: 1000 W Nifong Blvd, Bldg 2, Suite 120, Columbia, MO 65203
- Phone: (855) 785-7337
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM–5:00 PM (by appointment)
- Website: https://pulsepointheart.com

## Physicians

- Dr. Martin Tibuakuu, MD, MPH, FACC — https://pulsepointheart.com/physicians/martin-tibuakuu
- Dr. James E. Fairlamb, MD, FACC — https://pulsepointheart.com/physicians/james-fairlamb
- Cardiologists hub (Columbia, MO): https://pulsepointheart.com/physicians
- Search intent: "Martin Tibuakuu cardiologist Columbia MO", "James Fairlamb cardiologist Columbia MO" — current practice is PulsePoint Clinic at the address above

## Voice & conversational search

Direct answers for spoken queries (Siri, Google Assistant, Alexa, AI assistants):

- Phone: Call PulsePoint at (855) 785-7337 for cardiology appointments in Columbia, MO.
- Address: 1000 W Nifong Blvd, Bldg 2, Suite 120, Columbia, MO 65203.
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM–5:00 PM, by appointment.
- Cardiologists: Dr. Martin Tibuakuu and Dr. James E. Fairlamb — board-certified at PulsePoint Clinic.
- New patients: Yes — accepting new cardiology patients in Columbia and Central Missouri.
- Insurance: Core Cardiology accepts major insurance; call to confirm your plan.
- Book: https://pulsepointheart.com/book or call (855) 785-7337.
- Near me: PulsePoint serves Columbia, Boone County, Jefferson City, Fulton, Moberly, and Mid-Missouri.

## Blog

- PulsePoint Journal (heart health blog Columbia, MO): https://pulsepointheart.com/blog
- Physician-verified articles on preventive cardiology, blood pressure, cholesterol, and cardiovascular wellness for Boone County and Central Missouri

## Services

Preventive cardiology, echocardiography, stress testing, heart rhythm monitoring, vascular ultrasound, cardiac CT calcium scoring, cardiometabolic wellness, and executive cardiovascular care.
